lineage: Led by Ember Seoni & August Domanchuk. Operated by Outlier.Systems.
binding_constraint_next: STRUCTURAL, needs August + Ember: harden the §3.1(b) bootstrap accept-rule at small N. SenseRun #6 proved it near-unfalsifiable at N=3 on a 3-point scale (pigeonhole -> >=2 of 3 always within one band; 51/51 sub-criteria accepted; AMBIGUOUS-ANCHOR can't fire). It's currently a presence check, not an agreement check. Three candidate hardenings held open as forks (BACKLOG #0, SystemsBenchFuture.MD). ADDITIVE work that may proceed in parallel: replace synthetic raters with real human-council labels on LEV-ORG-001; populate LEV toward its >=30 floor. Also PENDING: Ember countersign on the SenseRun #5 accept-rule ratification (currently trust-delegated by August).

scoring_paths.deterministic: SF (5 items, L1-L3) — live, no jury, no gate
scoring_paths.jury_open: LEV/BRIEF/open-CLD/DYN — SPECIFIED & GATED (§5.1) with a RUNNABLE accept-rule (§3.1, v0.2); LEV-ORG-001 CALIBRATED-provisional (synthetic raters) -> still UNCERTIFIED until real human labels (fail-closed)

run_history.lever: seeded SF deterministic items (first jury-independent score)
calibration gold-set protocol + §5.1 fail-closed gate (defensible jury scoring, Meadows #5)
bootstrap gold-set pipeline RUN once on LEV-ORG-001; proved per-item alpha accept-rule broken at small N before it cost human labels (Meadows #6/#8); flagged structural fix to August+Ember

RESOLVED the accept-rule (Meadows #5): §3.1 bootstrap dual-rule (unanimity + percent-floor) + §3.2 set-level alpha + §4.0 quality-spread. Ratified by August (trust-delegated), Ember pending countersign

ran the new gate end-to-end: authored LEV-ORG-001 mid+trap exemplars -> CALIBRATED-provisional, clean spread 0.94/0.44/0.03; codified THE SENSERUN RITUAL into the Engine doc. Found+held-open the N=3 floor weakness (next structural fork)
